positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed mystical forest scene illustration. The main subject is a central arrangement of bioluminescent flora and stylized mythical creatures—such as geometric phoenix wings or glowing stag antlers—intertwined with stylized botanical elements like mandalas of leaves and vines. The style should be a clean, neo-Art Deco engraving mixed with psychedelic psychedelic symmetry. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and brilliant gold accents. The composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, creating a strong, appealing silhouette perfect for apparel printing. Crisp line work, vector quality, dramatic rim lighting, overhead view, fantasy illustration, ultra detailed, commercial artwork.
